vpnStatus.title: VPN status
vpnStatus.descriptionDisconnected: VPN is not connected. Default profile: {{profile}}.
vpnStatus.noDefaultProfile: Select a default VPN profile below before connecting.

vpnProfiles.title: VPN profiles
vpnProfiles.description: Choose the default profile used for system connect and disconnect.
vpnProfiles.empty: No VPN profiles found on this system.
vpnProfiles.loadFailed: Could not load VPN profiles from the system.

saved.title: Default profile saved
saved.message: {{profile}} is now the default VPN profile.

saveFailed.title: Could not save default profile
saveFailed.message: The selection was updated in the app but not written to the settings file.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Light or dark interface (saved for this device).

themeSaveFailed.title: Could not save theme
themeSaveFailed.message: Theme was updated in the app but not written to settings file.

languageSaveFailed.title: Could not save language
languageSaveFailed.message: Language was updated in the app but not written to settings file.

systemIntegration.title: System integration
systemIntegration.description: Control how autovpn starts with your operating system.
systemIntegration.launchAtStartupDescription: Start autovpn automatically when you log in to your computer.
systemIntegration.launchMinimizedDescription: Start with the window hidden. Applies the next time the app launches.

saved.title: System integration settings saved
saved.message: Your startup preferences have been saved.

saveFailed.title: Could not save system integration settings
saveFailed.message: Settings were updated in the app but not written to the settings file.

windowBehavior.title: Window
windowBehavior.description: Control how the app window behaves on your desktop.
windowBehavior.useSystemWindowFrameDescription: Use the native title bar and window borders instead of the custom Linux title bar.
windowBehavior.closeToTrayDescription: Hide the window to the system tray when closing instead of quitting the app.

saved.title: Window settings saved
saved.message: Your window preferences have been saved.

saveFailed.title: Could not save window settings
saveFailed.message: Settings were updated in the app but not written to the settings file.

appLock.title: App lock
appLock.description: Protect the app with a PIN. The PIN is stored securely in the system keyring.
appLock.enabledDescription: Requires setting a PIN. Adds a lock button in the header and idle lock.

enableModal.title: Set up app lock
enableModal.description: Create a PIN to enable app lock.

disableModal.title: Disable app lock?
disableModal.description: Enter your PIN to confirm. Disabling app lock will permanently remove your PIN from the system keyring.

changePinModal.title: Change PIN
changePinModal.description: Enter your current PIN and choose a new one.

errors.invalidLength: Password must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters.
errors.notPersisted: PIN could not be stored in the system keyring. Unlock your keyring (e.g. login keyring) and try again.

locked.title: App locked
locked.messageWithPin: Enter your PIN on the lock screen to continue.
locked.messageWithoutPin: Tap Unlock on the lock screen to continue.

pinRemoved.title: PIN removed
pinRemoved.message: The PIN has been removed from the system keyring.

pinRemoveFailed.title: Could not remove PIN
pinRemoveFailed.message: The PIN could not be removed from the system keyring.

pinSaved.title: PIN saved
pinSaved.message: Your PIN has been stored in the system keyring.

pinSaveFailed.title: Could not save PIN
pinSaveFailed.message: The PIN could not be stored in the system keyring.

pinMismatch.title: PINs do not match
pinMismatch.message: Enter the same PIN in both fields.

settingsSaved.title: App lock settings saved
settingsSaved.message: Your app lock preferences have been saved.

settingsSaveFailed.title: Could not save app lock settings
settingsSaveFailed.message: Settings were updated in the app but not written to the settings file.

disabled.title: App lock disabled
disabled.messageWithPin: App lock is off and your PIN has been removed from the system keyring.

tampered.title: Settings could not be verified
tampered.message: Protected settings were changed outside the app. App lock preferences were reset to safe defaults.

overlay.title: App locked
overlay.descriptionWithPin: Enter your PIN to unlock autovpn.
overlay.descriptionWithoutPin: Tap Unlock to continue using autovpn.
